title: Buttery Crumbly Japanese Courgette Crumble
description: A quick and easy post-workout dish featuring courgettes as the main ingredient, topped with a buttermilk crumb mixture for added texture and flavor.
instructions: Slice the courgettes into thin strips.
In a mixing bowl, combine buttermilk with sugar-free sweetener. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Add sliced pickled ginger to the buttermilk mixture and mix gently to distribute evenly throughout the mixture.
Heat cooking oil in a pan over medium heat. Add courgette strips and cook for about 5 minutes or until golden brown on both sides.
Remove courgettes from the pan and keep warm. Pour the buttermilk ginger mixture into the same pan used for cooking the courgettes, stir well to combine.
Add breadcrumbs to the buttermilk ginger mixture and mix gently until combined. Cook for about 3-4 minutes or until it forms a thick crumble on top of the buttermilk mixture.
Serve hot with the warm sliced courgettes and additional pickled ginger if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
